findings.description: Susan Miller was born on 17 March 1865 in Dundee, Angus, Scotland.
supporting_sources: Scotland, Births and Baptisms, 1564-1950 — Susan Miller, 1865, Dundee, Angus
Scotland, Census, 1871 — Susan Miller (age ~6) in the household of John Miller, corroborating a Scottish birth about 1865
